fixedOption = {'value': 'no_data', 'label': 'no_data'};if (!gs.nil(invalidOption)) {fixedOption.value = !global.JSUtil.nil(invalidOption.value) ? invalidOption.value : fixedOption.value;fixedOption.label = !global.JSUtil.nil(invalidOption.label) ? invalidOption.label : fixedOption.label;}return fixedOption;}function normalizeKeys(obj){Object.keys(obj).forEach(function (key) {var k = key.toLowerCase();if (k !== key) {obj[k] = obj[key];delete obj[key];}});return (obj);}var choiceOptions = [];choiceOptions = normalizedChoiceOptions = [];for (var i = 0; i < choiceOptions.length; i++) {normalizedChoiceOptions.push(normalizeKeys(choiceOptions[i]));}choiceOptions = normalizedChoiceOptions;for (var i = 0; i < (!isValid(choiceOptions[i])) {invalidCount++;choiceOptions[i] = fixInvalid(choiceOptions[i]);}}noOptions = invalidCount === choiceOptions.length;if (noOptions) {choiceOptions = Notification Script___97ae5f35fb4e4edc87db001690de80d8\";var ackMsg=null;ackMsg=(function execute() {\n return (function execute() {\nvar customerId = inputs.customer_number; // Assume this is passed as input\n\n// Query the reminder log table\nvar reminderGR = new GlideRecord('x_cpszo_spoke_reminder_log');\nreminderGR.addQuery('number', customerId);\nreminderGR.query();\n\nvar reminders = [];\nwhile (reminderGR.next()) {\n reminders.push({\n \"Reminder Message\": reminderGR.getValue('reminder_message'),\n \"Last Contact Date\": reminderGR.getValue('last_contact_date'),\n \"Reminder Schedule\": reminderGR.getValue('reminder_schedule'),\n \"Preferred Channel\": reminderGR.getValue('preferred_channel'),\n \"Reminder Status\": reminderGR.getValue('reminder_status')\n });\n}\n\nif (reminders.length > 0) {\n\n outputs.reminders = reminders;\n \n} else {\n outputs.message = \"No reminders found for the given Customer ID.\";\n}\n\n})();\n})();(function() {vaInputs.__silent_TextOutputPrompt_7bb600b3c4eb41a9b74ae5bdc43817eb.reset();})();ackMsg;","metadata":{"type":"graph_node","node_id":"97ae5f35fb4e4edc87db001690de80d8","node_name":"Check Notification
